transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Riverbend Health Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Alvarez.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Melissa Ortiz, born March 4th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Melissa. I see your appointment is this Thursday at 10 AM. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do sometime next Monday instead, maybe afternoon?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, Dr. Alvarez has an opening next Monday at 2:15 PM. Would that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've moved your appointment to Monday at 2:15 PM. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Melissa. Have a great day.
